data.label: React Native Firebase
data.description: React Native Firebase 是一组官方 React Native 模块，用于连接 Firebase 服务；每个模块都是一个轻量级 JavaScript 层，可连接到适用于 iOS 和 Android 的原生 Firebase SDK。

data.label: React Native Firebase
data.description: React Native Firebase is a collection of official React Native modules connecting you to Firebase services; each module is a light-weight JavaScript layer connecting you to the native Firebase SDKs for both iOS and Android.
